highlights.description: Unified CLI integrating all PRISM ecosystem modules
Static site generator for capability maturity dashboards
Lit web components for interactive maturity visualization
Module renames: prism-intelligence → prism-maturity, prism-execution → prism-roadmap

added.description: CLI with ecosystem, validate, and stats commands
Integrated CLI commands from prism-capability, prism-maturity, prism-roadmap
`prism site generate` command for static site generation
sitegen/ package for HTML dashboard generation with maturity overlays
Metrics count badge on capability cards
@prism/ui TypeScript package with Lit web components
maturity-grid Lit component with by-layer and by-category views
LitGridData types in sitegen for JSON data generation
`--prism-ui-js` flag for Lit component bundle integration
Theme sync between site and Lit components (light/dark mode)

changed.description: Rename ecosystem types: IntelligenceConfig → MaturityConfig, ExecutionConfig → RoadmapConfig
Rename site/ package to sitegen/ to avoid MkDocs output conflict
Conditional Lit vs Go template rendering based on --prism-ui-js flag

documentation.description: Add docs/getting-started/ with installation and quickstart guides
Add docs/cli/ with capability, maturity, roadmap, ecosystem, and site command reference
Add docs/guide/ with configuration and integration guides
Update README with module renames and site generator features
Update ECOSYSTEM.md with MaturityConfig and RoadmapConfig types

highlights.description: Repository repurposed as PRISM ecosystem orchestrator
prism-intelligence (maturity modeling) moved to separate repository
Unified orchestration layer connecting prism-capability, prism-intelligence, and prism-execution

breaking.description: Previous prism functionality (maturity modeling) moved to github.com/grokify/prism-intelligence
This repository now serves as the ecosystem orchestrator, not the maturity library

added.description: Ecosystem package with unified orchestration types
Config type for loading ecosystem configuration
Ecosystem type aggregating CapabilityStacks, PRISMDocuments, OKRSets, and Roadmaps
Cross-module validation for capability → SLI references

documentation.description: README with ecosystem architecture and quick start guide

releases.note: Final release before repository restructuring. This functionality is now in github.com/grokify/prism-intelligence.
